```python
dominant_state = "000"
dominant_count = counts.get(dominant_state, 0)
total_other_counts = sum(count for state, count in counts.items() if state != dominant_state)
assert dominant_count > total_other_counts, f"Expected {dominant_state} to dominate, but got {dominant_count} vs {total_other_counts} for other states"
assert dominant_count > shots * 0.4, f"Expected {dominant_state} to have >40% probability, got {dominant_count}/{shots} = {dominant_count/shots:.3f}"
```
